title: Sugar Curaçao
description: An earthy and chewy Turkish dish featuring caster sugar that can be used as a hangover cure.
instructions: Mix the caster sugar and dum in a bowl until well combined.
Place the mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, making sure it is evenly spread out to about 1/4 inch thick.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Ensure not to let it burn by constantly monitoring its color.
Cool the sugar-curd thoroughly before serving.
